SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.omf.records

Class OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.records.OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry
All Implemented Interfaces:
OmfRecordFixupp.Subrecord, StreamWritable
Enclosing class:
OmfRecordFixupp
public static class OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry extends Object implements OmfRecordFixupp.Subrecord
Fixup subrecord specifying a relocation entry.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FixupEntry(int dataRecordOffset, int locationType, boolean selfRelative, boolean frameFromThread, int frameMethod, Integer frameDatum, boolean targetFromThread, int targetMethod, Integer targetDatum, Integer targetDisplacement, OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType displacementType)
    Creates a fixup entry with all parameters and displacement type.

    Creates a fixup entry with typed methods and all parameters and displacement type.

  • Constructor Details

    • FixupEntry

      public FixupEntry(int dataRecordOffset, int locationType, boolean selfRelative, int frameMethod, int targetMethod, int frameDatum, int targetDatum, OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType displacementType)
      Creates a fixup entry with basic parameters and displacement type.
      Parameters:
      dataRecordOffset - offset into the data record
      locationType - type of location to fix
      selfRelative - whether the fixup is self-relative
      frameMethod - frame determination method
      targetMethod - target determination method
      frameDatum - frame datum value
      targetDatum - target datum value
      displacementType - the displacement type for this entry

    • FixupEntry

      public FixupEntry(int dataRecordOffset, int locationType, boolean selfRelative, OmfRecordFixupp.FrameMethod frameMethod, OmfRecordFixupp.TargetMethod targetMethod, int frameDatum, int targetDatum, OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType displacementType)
      Creates a fixup entry with typed methods and displacement type.
      Parameters:
      dataRecordOffset - offset into the data record
      locationType - type of location to fix
      selfRelative - whether the fixup is self-relative
      frameMethod - frame determination method
      targetMethod - target determination method
      frameDatum - frame datum value
      targetDatum - target datum value
      displacementType - the displacement type for this entry

    • FixupEntry

      public FixupEntry(int dataRecordOffset, int locationType, boolean selfRelative, boolean frameFromThread, int frameMethod, Integer frameDatum, boolean targetFromThread, int targetMethod, Integer targetDatum, Integer targetDisplacement, OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType displacementType)
      Creates a fixup entry with all parameters and displacement type.
      Parameters:
      dataRecordOffset - offset into the data record
      locationType - type of location to fix
      selfRelative - whether the fixup is self-relative
      frameFromThread - whether frame comes from a thread
      frameMethod - frame determination method
      frameDatum - frame datum value
      targetFromThread - whether target comes from a thread
      targetMethod - target determination method
      targetDatum - target datum value
      targetDisplacement - optional target displacement
      displacementType - the displacement type for this entry

    • FixupEntry

      public FixupEntry(int dataRecordOffset, int locationType, boolean selfRelative, boolean frameFromThread, OmfRecordFixupp.FrameMethod frameMethod, Integer frameDatum, boolean targetFromThread, OmfRecordFixupp.TargetMethod targetMethod, Integer targetDatum, Integer targetDisplacement, OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType displacementType)
      Creates a fixup entry with typed methods and all parameters and displacement type.
      Parameters:
      dataRecordOffset - offset into the data record
      locationType - type of location to fix
      selfRelative - whether the fixup is self-relative
      frameFromThread - whether frame comes from a thread
      frameMethod - frame determination method
      frameDatum - frame datum value
      targetFromThread - whether target comes from a thread
      targetMethod - target determination method
      targetDatum - target datum value
      targetDisplacement - optional target displacement
      displacementType - the displacement type for this entry

  • Method Details

    • getDataRecordOffset

      public int getDataRecordOffset()
      Returns the offset into the data record.
      Returns:
      the data record offset

    • getLocationType

      public int getLocationType()
      Returns the location type.
      Returns:
      the location type

    • isSelfRelative

      public boolean isSelfRelative()
      Returns whether the fixup is self-relative.
      Returns:
      true if relocation is relative to the current location

    • isFrameFromThread

      public boolean isFrameFromThread()
      Returns whether the frame comes from a thread.
      Returns:
      true if frame information is taken from a thread entry

    • getFrameMethod

      public int getFrameMethod()
      Returns the frame method value.
      Returns:
      the frame method value

    • getFrameMethodEnum

      public OmfRecordFixupp.FrameMethod getFrameMethodEnum()
      Returns the frame method enum.
      Returns:
      the frame method

    • getFrameDatum

      public Integer getFrameDatum()
      Returns the frame datum value.
      Returns:
      the frame datum, or null

    • isTargetFromThread

      public boolean isTargetFromThread()
      Returns whether the target comes from a thread.
      Returns:
      true if target information is taken from a thread entry

    • getTargetMethod

      public int getTargetMethod()
      Returns the target method value.
      Returns:
      the target method value

    • getTargetMethodEnum

      public OmfRecordFixupp.TargetMethod getTargetMethodEnum()
      Returns the target method enum.
      Returns:
      the target method

    • getEffectiveTargetMethodCode

      public int getEffectiveTargetMethodCode()
      Returns the effective target method code.
      Returns:
      the effective method code
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if target is from a thread

    • getEffectiveTargetMethodCode

      public int getEffectiveTargetMethodCode(OmfRecordFixupp.ThreadEntry targetThreadEntry)
      Returns the effective target method code with thread context.
      Parameters:
      targetThreadEntry - the target thread entry
      Returns:
      the effective method code

    • getTargetDatum

      public Integer getTargetDatum()
      Returns the target datum value.
      Returns:
      the target datum, or null

    • getTargetDisplacement

      public Integer getTargetDisplacement()
      Returns the target displacement value.
      Returns:
      the target displacement, or null

    • getDisplacementType

      public OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType getDisplacementType()
      Returns the displacement type for this entry.
      Returns:
      the displacement type

    • write

      public void write(ByteOutputStream bos) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: OmfRecordFixupp.Subrecord
      Writes this subrecord to a little-endian OMF byte stream.
      Specified by:
      write in interface OmfRecordFixupp.Subrecord
      Parameters:
      bos - output stream
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs
